channel.name: AI for Developers
channel.subject: Suggested addition for Awesome AI Coding Tools: Ralph Workflow

submitted_payload.suggested_entry: - [Ralph Workflow](https://codeberg.org/RalphWorkflow/Ralph-Workflow) — free and open-source composable loop framework and AI orchestrator for structured unattended coding workflows

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, owned content is saturated, and curator_outreach is the selected replacement lane. The AI for Developers awesome-ai-coding-tools list is the highest-priority direct curator target in the shared target file. GitHub API auth is unavailable from this environment, so email outreach through the maintainer contact page was the strongest legitimate same-run path.

summary: created a reusable SMTP-based curator outreach helper that logs each send without storing secrets in code
fixed a dry-run/runtime env bug so from-address resolution now correctly falls back to SMTP_USER

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, list inclusion, or a new qualified backlink path that sends evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
